Our Story

A deli with one foot in Beirut and one in Atlanta.

We grew up between two food cultures — the open-air markets and street kebabs of the Mediterranean, and the unhurried, lovingly-built sandwiches of the American South.

Sirocco is what happens when those two worlds sit at the same table. We marinate our steak the way our grandmothers did. We slice provolone the way the deli down the street does. We grill peppers and onions until they're sweet enough to eat on their own, then we tuck them into a hoagie roll with garlic aioli that we make every morning.

Nothing on our menu is an accident. Every sandwich is built around a memory and finished with a wink. Welcome in.

The Menu

What we're making today.

All sandwiches come with kettle chips. Sub French fries for $2. Make any sandwich a Loaded Fry Box for $2.

```
our signature ↓
The Phoenician Philly
$14
Marinated steak, provolone, grilled peppers and onions, garlic aioli. The sandwich that made us. Add lettuce, tomato, jalapeño & banana peppers — make it loaded for $2.
Signature House Special
i.
The Sirocco Sandwich
$13–$14
Berlin-style street kebab. Romaine, cucumber-tomato salad, pickled red onion, feta, spicy Sirocco sauce. Choose your protein — grilled chicken, beef & chicken kebab, beef & lamb, or falafel — and your vessel: doner bread, hoagie roll, spinach wrap, or loaded fry box.
Spicy Build Your Own
ii.
The Italian Job
$14
Grilled chicken, provolone, sun-dried tomato, mixed greens, basil pesto. Bright, herby, and the closest thing to a sun-soaked piazza you'll find on the Beltline.
Deli Classic
iii.
The BLT
$14
Applewood-smoked bacon, swiss cheese, lettuce, tomato, buttermilk ranch. The Southern half of our heritage, treated with the respect it deserves.
Southern
iv.
Ham or Turkey
$10
Maple-cured turkey or ham, honey mustard, American cheese. Built simple, built right — for the days when you want a sandwich, not an experience.
Classic
v.
Sirocco Falafel
$13
House-made falafel, tahini, cucumber-tomato salad, pickled onions, lettuce. Crispy outside, fluffy in, and yes — the vegan option that meat-eaters keep ordering.
Vegan
```

Why Sirocco

Three things we don't cut corners on.

01

The Bread

Hoagie rolls with a real crust. Doner bread that holds up. Spinach wraps that aren't an afterthought. The vessel is half the sandwich, and we treat it that way.

```
02

The Marinade

Our steak sits overnight in olive oil, garlic, lemon, and the kind of spice blend that took us a year to get right. No shortcuts. No "let it sit while you slice it."

03

The Sauces

Ten in-house sauces, made fresh. Spicy Sirocco hits like a memory. Garlic aioli is the reason the Phoenician Philly works. Pick two — we won't tell you which.

```

The whole spread.

Everything we serve, in one frame — straight from the stall.
